content: Pydantic v2 current version ~2.13.x, core validation logic rewritten in Rust (pydantic-core), 4x-50x faster than v1. Recommended patterns: use model_config = ConfigDict(...) instead of class Config; @field_validator for single-field checks, @model_validator(mode='after') for cross-field invariants (e.g. an aircraft's assigned altitude vs cleared approach state); compose state via nested models/discriminated unions to represent flight phases (departure/climb/cruise/approach/landed) rather than one giant mutable blob; use frozen=True + model_copy(update=...) for immutable state snapshots which pairs well with a fixed-timestep sim needing to diff previous/current state for interpolation; validate at system boundaries (scenario file load, navdata load) and treat in-memory sim objects as already-validated after construction to avoid per-tick validation overhead.
